examples: A crystal chandelier lit the room.
He turned to face a chandelier covered with tarpaulin.
I remembered that there was a chandelier suspended from the ceiling.
The character of the blossoms in, say, a 1760s French or German chandelier gives pleasure.
Uniformed hotel staff greet guests arriving by Shinkansen train trackside for an escort up to the sumptuous, chandelier-encrusted perch.
